---
title: "Part 0 --- Preface"
bibliography: references.bib
author:
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
---
::: {.content-visible when-format="docx" note="this should be identical as authors above, for docx"}
author:
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
:::

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS PART

## Theme --- ThemeTitle. Preface? 

C0.1 How this book/comminity came about: Chapter from editors - how we got here and how we did it 
C0.2 What's in the book (introduce the parts) 


::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="epub"}

## References {.unnumbered}

:::
